strings.Main.HotKeyError.Title: FastTools
strings.Main.HotKeyError.Body: The app will stay open so you can update the hotkey in Settings.
strings.HotKey.Error.InvalidFormat: Invalid hotkey format. Use a value like 'Alt+Space'.
strings.HotKey.Error.RegistrationFailed: Failed to register the global hotkey; it may already be in use by another application.
strings.Settings.Title: FastTools Settings
strings.Settings.Header.Title: Preferences
strings.Settings.General.Title: General
strings.Settings.General.Description: Core behavior, language, and visual style
strings.Settings.HotKeys.Title: Hotkeys
strings.Settings.HotKeys.Description: Alt+Space wakes the search bar. Click and press a new key combination to change it.
strings.Settings.SearchBarPosition.Title: Search window alignment
strings.Settings.WindowPosition.Title: Search window display mode
strings.Settings.ResultActivation.Title: Result activation
strings.Settings.ResultActivation.Desc: Choose how search results are opened by mouse and keyboard.
strings.Settings.HideShortcutResults.Desc: Exclude apps indexed from .lnk shortcuts; keep only .exe files and installed apps in results.
strings.Settings.AlwaysOnTop.Desc: Keep the search window above other windows while it is open.
strings.Settings.SearchDebounceEnabled.Desc: When enabled, rapid typing cancels earlier searches and only runs the latest query to reduce repeated search work.
strings.Settings.SearchDebounceMilliseconds.Desc: Set how long to wait before running the final search during rapid typing. Enter 0 to keep the optimization without extra wait.
strings.Settings.LoggingEnabled.Desc: When enabled, search, plugin and hotkey activity is recorded in the Logs panel. Disable to skip all logging.
strings.Settings.InvalidSearchDebounceMillisecon: Please enter a debounce delay in milliseconds that is 0 or greater.
strings.Settings.InvalidResultKeyboardActivation: Please enter a valid keyboard shortcut for result activation.
strings.Settings.CustomCommands.Title: Custom Commands
strings.Settings.CustomCommands.Description: Expose local scripts and terminal tools in search
strings.Settings.Priority.Title: Result Priority
strings.Settings.Priority.Description: Reorder how result groups are surfaced.
strings.Settings.Priority.Help: Drag a row to reorder. Groups higher up appear first in search results.
strings.Settings.Plugins.Title: Plugins
strings.Settings.Plugins.Description: Select a plugin to view its settings and toggle its enable state
strings.Settings.Logs.Title: Logs
strings.Settings.Logs.Description: Review runtime logs filtered by minimum level.
strings.Settings.About.Title: About
strings.Settings.About.Tagline: A fast local launcher that puts apps, files, and commands at your fingertips.
strings.Settings.Name: Name
strings.Settings.InvalidHotKey: Invalid hotkey format. Use a value like Alt+Space.
